recommendations.title: The Best Is Yet to Come
recommendations.overview: Following a huge misunderstanding, two friends always decide to tackle everything to make up for lost time.
recommendations.director: Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte

recommendations.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
recommendations.overview: Edmond Dantès becomes the target of a sinister plot and is arrested on his wedding day for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in the island prison of Château d’If, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity
recommendations.director: Matthieu Delaporte, Alexandre de La Patellière

recommendations.title: What's in a Name

recommendations.director: Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte

recommendations.title: Fight Club

recommendations.title: Running Scared
recommendations.overview: A low-ranking thug is entrusted by his boss to dispose of a gun that killed corrupt cops, but things spiral out of control when the gun ends up in wrong hands.

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

recommendations.title: A Widow's Game
recommendations.overview: When a man is found dead, the investigation shatters his widow's perfect facade and exposes a hidden double life in this thriller based on real events.

recommendations.title: Seconds Apart
